is_p_falciparum.evidence: In-vivo study of 254 patients with uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria in rural eastern Sudan.

reports_target_markers.evidence: The paper mentions pfcrt 76T, pfmdr1 86Y, and dhfr 108N with frequencies but only as citations to prior surveys (Abdel-Muhsin et al. 2003; Babiker et al. 2005; Giha et al. 2006). This clinical efficacy study itself did not genotype resistance markers; molecular data are 'manuscript in preparation' / 'unpublished data'.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Frequencies quoted (pfcrt 76T 0.73→0.97, pfmdr1 86Y 0.65→0.86, dhfr 108N 0.31→0.76) are from prior/other publications describing 1998-2002 surveys, not this study's own field samples with numerator/denominator.

sub_country_location.evidence: Study conducted in Daraweesh and Kajara villages, 15 km from Gedarif town, Eastern Sudan — sub-national resolution.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: The in-vivo study was conducted October–December 2003; cited marker frequencies were from 1998-2002 surveys binned by year.

african_field_samples.evidence: Human clinical isolates from rural eastern Sudan (African country), field-based village study.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary in-vivo drug efficacy study of 254 patients.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Study area is a long-running research site (Daraweesh); marker frequencies cited come from Abdel-Muhsin et al. 2003, Babiker et al. 2005, and Giha et al. 2006 covering overlapping samples from the same area.

supplement.evidence: The molecular resistance data are described as 'manuscript in preparation' and 'unpublished data' rather than in a supplement to this paper; no per-locus frequencies for this study's own samples are provided or pointed to.

assessment.summary: This is a primary in-vivo SP/SP+CQ drug efficacy study in 254 P. falciparum patients from Daraweesh and Kajara villages, eastern Sudan (Oct–Dec 2003). While it mentions target marker frequencies (pfcrt 76T, pfmdr1 86Y, dhfr 108N/51I), these are drawn from prior/other publications and 'manuscript in preparation'/'unpublished' data covering 1998-2002 surveys, not molecular genotyping performed on this study's own samples. No extractable per-locus resistance frequencies from this study are reported.
exclusion_reasons: No original drug-resistance marker genotyping data generated in this study — marker frequencies are cited from other publications/unpublished work
No extractable numerator/denominator per-locus frequencies for this study's own samples
